name: The Half-Cathedral
descriptionSeed: Two hundred years of building and it is beautiful and it is not close to done and it never will be, because three generations of Wrights have each improved the design and the improving IS the worship. It is the most moving building in the world and you cannot say what it is for.
encounterFlavor: Builders who will never see it finished and do not mind; a design change that undoes forty years of work, cheerfully; an Unmaker standing very still, saying nothing.
questSeeds: Someone has produced a design that would FINISH the cathedral, and the city is at war over it
A section built two centuries ago is failing, and fixing it means understanding what the first Wrights meant
